title: Tree TV
description: Put her in the crib by the window and she'll zone out watching the tree outside. So zen that sometimes it... helps things move along. Nature's laxative, if you will.

title: Elevator Jump Scare
description: Elevator doors open? STARTLED. Elevator doors close? STARTLED AGAIN. Every single time. It never gets old for us.

title: Gimme That!
description: Whatever mom or dad is holding, she needs it. Phone? Mine. Spoon? Mine. Tax documents? Also mine.

title: Bottle? No Thanks.
description: Hasn't touched a bottle since month 4. Just decided one day they were beneath her and never looked back.

title: Personal Space Police
description: Try to touch her face, cheeks, or chest and she will push your hand away with full attitude. This girl has boundaries.

title: Tech CEO in Training
description: Laptops, phones, remotes, books. She will army-crawl across the entire room at record speed just to grab one of these.

title: Banana Stan
description: Bananas make her instantly happy. Apples are a personal betrayal. She knows what she likes and she's not sorry about it.

title: Tiny Drummer Legs
description: Excited? Legs go brrrr. Bored? Also legs go brrrr. Those little feet just never stop kicking.

title: Dad's Lullaby Club
description: Falls asleep to dad's singing and only dad's singing. Spotify could never compete.

title: Social Butterfly
description: Laughs at everyone, goes to strangers without a single tear. Absolutely zero stranger danger awareness.

title: Volume: Maximum
description: This girl has ONE volume setting and it's loud. Neighbors three doors down know when she's awake.

title: Bookworm (Literally)
description: Her cloth Christmas book is her prized possession. She'll crinkle that thing all day long if you let her.

title: Stroller Philosopher
description: Goes on walks with mom and just vibes. Super chill, quiet, taking in the Seattle scenery like a tiny tourist who's seen it all before.
